'''''Eichler''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that supported the [[Task force/Legends|task force]], led by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. While mustering in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]] it was identified as carrying military equipment by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] reconnaissance mission flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a lone [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]].

{{Ship-stub}}
